title: Over N753bn raised in Commercial Paper issuance, says SEC DG - FinancialEDGE
description: Nigeria’s capital market raised over N753bn through commercial paper issuances between April and October 2025, underscoring strong investor confidence and the resilience of the market, Director General of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Dr. Emomotimi Agama, has said. Agama who disclosed this while delivering in an interview, noted that the funds supported short-term financing
html: Nigeria’s capital market raised over N753bn through commercial paper issuances between April and October 2025, underscoring strong investor confidence and the resilience of the market, Director General of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Dr. Emomotimi Agama, has said.
